Description: Complete authentication system including user registration, login, password management, and email verification for restaurant owners and staff members.
Implement restaurant owner registration flow with email verification. Create restaurant entity, owner user account, and send verification email. Validate unique email and business information.
Implement secure login with email/password. Generate JWT access token (15min) and refresh token (30 days). Store refresh token in Redis. Log authentication events.
Implement token refresh mechanism. Validate refresh token from Redis, generate new access token. Handle token rotation and blacklisting.
Implement logout functionality. Invalidate refresh token in Redis, add access token to blacklist. Clear user session.
Implement forgot password flow. Generate secure reset token, send email with reset link. Token expires in 1 hour.
Implement password reset with token validation. Verify token, hash new password with bcrypt (12 rounds), invalidate reset token.
Implement password change for authenticated users. Verify old password, validate new password strength, update with bcrypt hash.
Implement email verification after registration. Validate verification token, activate user account, update email_verified status.
Restaurant profile management including creation, updates, logo upload, statistics dashboard, and soft deletion for multi-tenant SaaS platform.
Create new restaurant entity during registration. Initialize with default settings, create first subscription (trial), set up tenant context.
Update restaurant profile information including name, contact details, business hours. Validate tenant ownership before update.
Retrieve complete restaurant details including subscription status, feature limits, branch count, and statistics.
Upload restaurant logo to Cloudinary. Validate image format (JPEG/PNG/WEBP), size limit (5MB). Store URL in database.
Generate restaurant-wide statistics: total revenue, order count, active branches, table utilization, popular items. Cache results.
Soft delete restaurant and cascade to all related entities. Archive data, cancel subscription, notify owner via email.
Multi-branch operations including creation, updates, status management, statistics, and branch-level configuration for restaurant chains.
Create new branch under restaurant. Validate subscription limits (max branches). Initialize with areas and default settings.
Update branch information: name, address, phone, business hours. Validate tenant ownership and branch existence.
Retrieve branch details including areas, table count, active orders, staff assigned, and current status.
List all branches with pagination, filtering, and sorting. Support search by name/address. Cache results.
Soft delete branch. Validate no active orders, reassign staff, archive data. Prevent deletion if only branch.
Generate branch-specific statistics: daily revenue, order count, table turnover, peak hours, staff performance.
Update branch operational status (active/inactive/maintenance). Notify staff, update table availability.
Complete table and area management including QR code generation, table status tracking, area organization, and table merging for split bills.
Create dining area within branch (Main Dining, VIP, Outdoor). Set sort order for display. Validate unique name per branch.
Update area information and sort order. Validate no active orders in area before major changes.
Delete area if no tables assigned. Soft delete with validation. Prevent deletion if tables exist.
Create table with auto-generated QR code. Set capacity, area assignment. Generate unique QR token using SHA256 hash.
Update table information: name, capacity, area, position. Validate no active orders before major changes.
Soft delete table. Validate no active orders or reservations. Archive QR code.
Generate/regenerate QR code for table. Create unique token, generate QR image, store in Cloudinary. Return QR URL.
Retrieve table information by scanning QR code. Validate token, return table details with branch and restaurant info. Cache result.
Update table status (Available/Occupied/Reserved/OutOfService). Trigger WebSocket event for real-time updates.
Merge multiple tables for split bill feature. Move orders from source to target table. Record merge history. Validate same branch.
Comprehensive menu management including categories, items, customizations, availability tracking, image uploads, and search functionality.
Create menu category (Appetizer, Main Course, Dessert, Drinks). Set sort order. Support global or branch-specific categories.
Update category name, description, sort order. Validate tenant ownership.
Soft delete category. Cascade to menu items. Validate no active orders with items from category.
Create menu item with price, description, image. Link to category. Support branch-specific or global items.
Update menu item details. Invalidate cache. Log price changes for audit trail.
Soft delete menu item. Validate no active orders. Keep historical order data intact.
Upload menu item image to Cloudinary. Validate format and size. Generate thumbnails. Store URL.
Retrieve complete menu with categories, items, customizations. Filter by availability. Cache aggressively (2 hours TTL).
Update item availability status (available/out_of_stock). Set reason. Invalidate menu cache. Notify via WebSocket.
Create customization group (Size, Toppings, Spice Level). Set min/max selections, required flag.
Add option to customization group with price delta. Set sort order. Support multiple options per group.
Search menu items by name/description. Support fuzzy search. Filter by category, availability. Return ranked results.
Complete order lifecycle management including creation, updates, status tracking, item management, and real-time synchronization with kitchen and customer.

Create order from QR scan. Validate menu items availability. Calculate totals (subtotal, tax 10%, service charge 5%). Create in PostgreSQL, log event in MongoDB, emit WebSocket event, invalidate cache.
Retrieve order with full details: items, customizations, payment status, table info. Try cache first (5min TTL).
Update order status (Pending→Preparing→Ready→Served→Completed). Log event to MongoDB. Emit WebSocket to kitchen and customer. Invalidate cache.
Add items to existing order. Recalculate totals. Validate order not paid. Log event. Emit real-time update.
Remove item from order. Recalculate totals. Validate order not paid. Log event.
Update item quantity or customizations. Recalculate totals. Validate order not paid. Log event.
Cancel order within cancellation window (5 minutes). Update table status to Available. Refund if paid. Log event.
List active orders for branch (Pending/Preparing/Ready/Served). Cache 5 minutes. Support real-time updates.
Retrieve order history for specific table. Support pagination. Show payment status.
Retrieve complete order event history from MongoDB. Show timeline of all status changes and modifications.
Secure payment processing with ACID transactions, idempotency, webhook verification, refunds, and financial reporting. Integrates with PayOS gateway.

Process payment with SELECT FOR UPDATE lock. Check idempotency key. Validate amount matches order total. Update order and table status in transaction. Log to MongoDB. Emit WebSocket event. CRITICAL: Prevent double payment.
Verify PayOS webhook signature using HMAC-SHA256. Validate transaction reference. Update payment status. Handle success/failure cases.
Retrieve payment details including transaction reference, method, status, PayOS data. Include order information.
Process refund in transaction. Update payment status (Refunded/PartialRefund). Update order status to Cancelled. Log event. Call PayOS refund API.
List payment history with filters (date range, status, method). Support pagination. Show order details.
Generate payment statistics: total revenue, success rate, payment methods breakdown, average transaction value. Cache results.
Retry failed payment with new idempotency key. Validate order still unpaid. Generate new transaction reference.
Generate invoice for paid order. Include itemized list, taxes, service charges. Store as PDF. Send via email.
Online table booking system with availability checking, confirmation workflow, calendar view, and automated notifications.
Create table reservation. Check table availability using 2-hour buffer. Validate party size fits capacity. Send confirmation email.
Update reservation details (time, party size, table). Recheck availability. Send update notification.
Cancel reservation. Free up table. Send cancellation email. Update status to Cancelled.
Confirm pending reservation. Update status. Send confirmation email with details and QR code.
Retrieve reservation details including customer info, table, branch, status.
List reservations with filters (date range, status, branch). Support pagination. Calendar view data.
Check table availability for date/time/party size. Consider existing reservations and 2-hour buffer. Return available tables sorted by capacity.
Real-time customer service request system for calling staff, requesting items, and tracking response times with WebSocket notifications.
Create service request from QR scan (Call Staff, Request Water, Request Bill, etc.). Store in MongoDB. Emit WebSocket to staff. Set priority.
Staff acknowledges request. Update status to ACKNOWLEDGED. Record acknowledged_at timestamp. Notify customer via WebSocket.
Mark request as RESOLVED. Calculate response time. Update resolved_at. Notify customer. Auto-delete after 24 hours (TTL).
List pending requests for branch sorted by priority and creation time. Real-time updates via WebSocket.
Assign request to specific staff member. Update assigned_to field. Notify staff via WebSocket.
Calculate statistics: total requests, average response time, requests by type, resolution rate. Group by time period.
Staff account management with role-based access control, branch assignment, activity logging, and permission management.
Create staff account (Manager/Staff/Chef/Cashier). Assign to branch. Set permissions based on role. Send welcome email with credentials.
Update staff information (name, email, phone). Validate email uniqueness. Log changes to activity log.
Soft delete staff account. Unassign from branch. Invalidate tokens. Archive activity logs.
Assign staff to branch. Validate branch belongs to restaurant. Update staff record. Notify staff.
Change staff role. Update permissions accordingly. Invalidate existing tokens. Require re-login.
List staff with filters (branch, role, status). Support pagination and search. Show last login.
Retrieve staff activity log from MongoDB. Show actions performed, entities modified, timestamps. Support filtering.
Activate/deactivate staff account. Invalidate tokens if deactivated. Notify staff via email.
SaaS subscription management with plan tiers (Basic/Standard/Advanced), feature limits, upgrades, renewals, and billing.
Create subscription during restaurant registration. Default to trial plan. Set start/end dates. Initialize feature limits.
Upgrade to higher plan. Calculate prorated amount. Update feature limits immediately. Process payment via PayOS. Send confirmation.
Cancel subscription. Set end date. Downgrade to free plan at period end. Send cancellation confirmation.
Auto-renew subscription. Process payment. Extend end date. Handle payment failures with retry logic.
Retrieve subscription details: plan type, features, limits, billing cycle, next renewal date.
Check if restaurant has reached feature limit (max tables, max branches). Used before creating new entities. Cache limits.
Customer feedback and rating system with dish-specific ratings, sentiment analysis, response management, and statistics.
Create feedback after order completion. Rate overall (1-5), food, service, ambiance. Rate individual dishes. Upload photos. Store in MongoDB. Auto-detect sentiment.
List feedbacks with filters (rating, date range, sentiment). Support pagination. Show customer info if not anonymous.
Restaurant responds to feedback. Store response with timestamp and responder. Notify customer via email.
Calculate statistics: average ratings, sentiment distribution, response rate, trending issues. Cache results.
Get ratings for specific dish. Calculate average rating, total reviews. Show recent comments. Help identify popular/unpopular items.
Business intelligence dashboard with revenue reports, popular items analysis, peak hours, table turnover, staff performance, and export functionality.
Generate dashboard overview: today's revenue, active orders, table occupancy, pending service requests. Real-time updates. Cache 5 minutes.
Generate revenue report by date range. Group by day/week/month. Show trends, comparisons. Support branch filtering. Cache results.
Identify popular menu items by order frequency and quantity. Show revenue contribution. Filter by date range and branch.
Analyze order patterns to identify peak hours. Group by hour of day and day of week. Help with staff scheduling.
Calculate table turnover rate: average dining duration, tables per day. Identify optimization opportunities.
Analyze staff performance: orders handled, service request response time, customer ratings. Support comparison.
Export reports to Excel/PDF. Support all report types. Generate asynchronously for large datasets. Email download link.
Analyze customer behavior: order patterns, average spend, visit frequency, preferred items. Use MongoDB session data.
Multi-channel notification system for order updates, payment confirmations, service requests, and system alerts via WebSocket, email, and SMS.
Send real-time notification when order created/updated. WebSocket to kitchen display and staff devices. Include order details.
Send payment confirmation via email and WebSocket. Include receipt, invoice PDF. Update customer and staff.
Send real-time notification to staff when service requested. WebSocket with sound alert. Show table location and request type.
Retrieve notification history from MongoDB. Filter by type, status, date range. Support pagination.
